metadata.description: Jameson's personal collection of GitHub Copilot agent skills.

plugins.name: agent-refiner
plugins.description: Review and tighten Copilot agent files for persona clarity, process bloat, and constraint enforcement.

plugins.name: build-deck
plugins.description: Build presentation decks as standalone SVG slides and packaged .pptx files.

plugins.name: chronicle-collect
plugins.description: Collect and query Copilot session-store history across machines.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Run local code-quality review with dual sub-agent review and human triage.

plugins.name: diagram-help
plugins.description: Lightweight reference for Mermaid and SVG diagram rendering gotchas.

plugins.name: engdirs-status
plugins.description: Audit .eng git repos for dirty state, unpushed commits, and initialization issues.

plugins.name: engflow
plugins.description: Engineering workflow agents and skills for GitHub Copilot.

plugins.name: pandoc-docx
plugins.description: Convert markdown files to styled .docx using pandoc.

plugins.name: plugin-creator
plugins.description: Create, inspect, install, and troubleshoot GitHub Copilot plugins.

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Create and update GitHub Copilot agent skills.

plugins.name: slop-check
plugins.description: Detect and fix AI slop in prose, docs, and status writing.

plugins.name: visual-design
plugins.description: Judge and improve static visual artifacts so they read as intentional.

plugins.name: work-search
plugins.description: Search and retrieve work information across M365 activity, internal engineering knowledge, and Microsoft documentation.

plugins.name: worktree-setup
plugins.description: Set up isolated git worktrees for Copilot agent work.
